summary: PR #2634 matched and linked the Samus missile item translation unit by changing configure.py from NonMatching to Matching for itsamusmissile.c, reorganizing and typing functions in src/melee/it/items/itsamusmissile.c and its header, and making small companion cleanups in itlinkbomb.c.

key_files.role: Linked itsamusmissile.c by changing its object classification from NonMatching to Matching.
Primary matched item TU; adds ItemStateTable placement, reorders helper/collision/anim functions, cleans a goto-heavy return path, adjusts includes, and changes animation return types to bool.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F7340[] added near file top
raw_diff: it_802B64FC goto block_18 exits replaced with direct return conditions
raw_diff: itSamusmissile_UnkMotion0_Anim and UnkMotion1_Anim changed from s32 to bool

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for the matched TU, including Item_GObj parameter types and bool return types for animation callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_GObj prototypes changed to Item_GObj for several declarations
raw_diff: long animation prototypes changed to bool

key_files.role: Companion cleanup in another item TU: boolean condition normalization, helper-call substitution, and removal of a small inline wrapper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itLinkbomb_UnkMotion3_Anim_inline1 removed and call site changed to it_8029EC34(gobj)

what_changed.text: Marked melee/it/items/itsamusmissile.c as Matching in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor list changes Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching)

what_changed.text: Added/repositioned the Samus missile ItemStateTable it_803F7340 with four state entries using motion anim, phys, and collision callbacks.
Moved small collision and animation callback definitions later in itsamusmissile.c, near related motion code, without changing their shown bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itSamusmissile_UnkMotion0_Coll, UnkMotion1_Coll, and UnkMotion3_Anim removed from file top and re-added later

what_changed.text: Cleaned part of it_802B64FC by replacing several generated block/goto exits with direct returns and a combined zero-vector guard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vec3.x/vec3.y branch ladder -> if ((vec3.x == 0.0f) && (vec3.y == 0.0f)) return
raw_diff: var_f1 < sa->x20 goto block_18 -> return

what_changed.text: Updated itsamusmissile.h prototypes toward recovered item-specific signatures, including bool animation returns.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: several HSD_GObj* declarations changed to Item_GObj*

what_changed.text: Adjusted includes in itsamusmissile.c: removed baselib/jobj.h, it/it_266F.h, and math.h from the excerpt; added it/itgroundcoll.h and used angle-bracket baselib/mtx.h.
Simplified several itlinkbomb.c checks from explicit == 0 comparisons to logical negation, and replaced a removed inline wrapper with an existing helper call.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itLinkbomb_UnkMotion3_Anim_inline1 removed; call site changed to it_8029EC34(gobj)

smart_moves.text: The PR linked the TU only after source-level cleanup in the same slice, making the configure.py Matching change traceable to itsamusmissile.c edits.
evidence_refs: PR title: match and link itsamusmissile.c

smart_moves.text: Function prototypes in the header were updated alongside body changes instead of relying on stale long/HSD_GObj declarations.
Generated-looking control flow in it_802B64FC was narrowed to direct early returns where the diff shows equivalent exit blocks.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When an item TU becomes matchable, update configure.py and the owning header in the same focused PR so the linked object and recovered signatures stay aligned.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py NonMatching -> Matching for itsamusmissile.c

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item motion callbacks that return false, use bool callback prototypes when the body and state-table usage support boolean behavior rather than leaving generic long/s32 signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itSamusmissile_UnkMotion0_Anim s32 -> bool and returns false
raw_diff: itSamusmissile_UnkMotion1_Anim s32 -> bool and returns false
raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F7340 references the animation callbacks

decomp_lessons.lesson: Generated exit-block labels can often be collapsed to direct returns when all paths only branch to a final return block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802B64FC block_17 and var_f1 early exits changed to return; final block_18 removed

naming_conventions.text: The PR preserves address-style names such as it_802B63F8, it_802B64FC, it_802B701C, and it_803F7340 where semantic names are not introduced by the evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itsamusmissile.c function and data names retained

naming_conventions.text: Item pointer locals use the common short role name ip, and attributes use attrs or sa in the shown item code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline void itSamusMissile_ClampTurn(Item* ip, itSamusMissileAttributes* sa)

naming_conventions.text: Boolean tests against helper functions are written as !helper(gobj) rather than helper(gobj) == 0 in the touched itlinkbomb.c call sites.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reclassify a TU from NonMatching to Matching only after source edits bring the object into the matching set.
evidence_refs: PR title: match and link itsamusmissile.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use declaration/signature tightening as part of matching cleanup: Item_GObj-specific prototypes and bool animation returns replace broader HSD_GObj/long declarations in the header.
Move state table and callback definitions into an order that supports the matched TU without adding new semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F7340 added near top; collision and animation callbacks re-added later

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Narrow generated control-flow artifacts by replacing branch-to-return labels with explicit early returns.
PAD_STACK remains present in touched item code, but this PR slice does not provide objdiff/build evidence explaining it.

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Remaining item TUs: 17; Remaining item functions: 62

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header signatures should be tightened with matched item body recovery
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2634 updates itsamusmissile.h from broad HSD_GObj/long declarations toward Item_GObj/bool declarations while linking the TU as Matching.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Collapse branch-to-return labels during cleanup when the diff shows only final-return exits
accepted_candidate_records.text: In it_802B64FC, several gotos to a final return block are replaced by direct returns and the final label is removed.

source_update_candidates.title: itsamusmissile.c linked as Matching in PR #2634
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2634 changes configure.py so melee/it/items/itsamusmissile.c is built as Object(Matching, ...) instead of Object(NonMatching, ...).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py NonMatching -> Matching for melee/it/items/itsamusmissile.c
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete path status fact supported by the PR diff, but should be curated into path facts rather than promoted by intake.

source_update_candidates.title: Prefer direct boolean callback return types for item animation callbacks when body and table usage support them
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2634 changed Samus missile animation callbacks from s32/long style prototypes to bool while the bodies return false and are used as item state animation callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itSamusmissile_UnkMotion0_Anim and UnkMotion1_Anim changed to bool
raw_diff: ItemStateTable it_803F7340 references the callbacks
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible standard refinement for callback typing; should be checked against broader item callback conventions before adoption.
